An attacker can forge DSA signatures or X.509 certificates that X509.verifySignature() accepts by supplying malicious domain parameters such as g=1, y=1, and a fixed r=1, which make the verification title: jsrsasign: DSA signatures or X.509 certificates can be forged via DSA domain-parameter validation in KJUR.crypto.DSA.setPublic
